creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-10-18 21:52:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-im               Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-im/tkabbur       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net-im/tkabbur/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  Tkabbur is a modification of XMPP/Jabber client Tkabber,
  that brings many new features.
  
  WWW: http://code.google.com/p/tkabbur/
  
  PR:             ports/128073
  Submitted by:   Dennis Herrmann <adox at mcx2.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.95      +1 -0      ports/net-im/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-im/tkabbur/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/net-im/tkabbur/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net-im/tkabbur/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1238 -0   ports/net-im/tkabbur/pkg-plist (new)
